scripts.format:check: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 sh -c "git ls-files -z -- '*.js' '*.cjs' '*.mjs' '*.ts' '*.tsx' '*.jsx' '*.json' '*.md' '*.css' '*.scss' '*.html' '*.yml' '*.yaml' '*.toml' '*.sh' '.prettierrc' | xargs -0 prettier --check --ignore-unknown"
scripts.format: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 sh -c "git ls-files -z -- '*.js' '*.cjs' '*.mjs' '*.ts' '*.tsx' '*.jsx' '*.json' '*.md' '*.css' '*.scss' '*.html' '*.yml' '*.yaml' '*.toml' '*.sh' '.prettierrc' | xargs -0 prettier --write --ignore-unknown"
scripts.compose: npm run compose:build && npm run compose:up
scripts.compose:clean: npm run compose:build:clean && npm run compose:up
scripts.compose:local:up: bash ./scripts/docker-compose-with-env.sh --env-file server/.env --env-file server/.env.local --env-file client/.env.local -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d
scripts.compose:local:down: bash ./scripts/docker-compose-with-env.sh --env-file server/.env --env-file server/.env.local --env-file client/.env.local -f docker-compose.local.yml down
scripts.compose:local:logs: bash ./scripts/docker-compose-with-env.sh --env-file server/.env --env-file server/.env.local --env-file client/.env.local -f docker-compose.local.yml logs -f
scripts.compose:local:build: bash ./scripts/docker-compose-with-env.sh --env-file server/.env --env-file server/.env.local --env-file client/.env.local -f docker-compose.local.yml build
scripts.compose:local:build:clean: bash ./scripts/docker-compose-with-env.sh --env-file server/.env --env-file server/.env.local --env-file client/.env.local -f docker-compose.local.yml build --pull --no-cache
scripts.compose:local: npm run compose:local:build && npm run compose:local:up
scripts.compose:local:clean: npm run compose:local:build:clean && npm run compose:local:up
scripts.compose:e2e:up: npm run compose:e2e:clean && bash ./scripts/docker-compose-with-env.sh --env-file .env.e2e -f docker-compose.e2e.yml up -d
scripts.e2e: npm run compose:e2e:build && npm run e2e:up && npm run e2e:test && npm run e2e:down
scripts.e2e:clean: npm run compose:e2e:build:clean && npm run e2e:up && npm run e2e:test && npm run e2e:down
